title: Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide

The '''''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide''' is a 384-page paperback book designed to help the gamer through the ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' game, as well as the original ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. It was written by [[Michael Knight]] and published by [[Prima Games]] on [[October 24]], [[2006]].

The book restates much of the content of the original game's strategy guide and adds information about [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] tactics and units.

{{Book-stub}}

==Media==
===Editions===
*{{ISBN|0761554165}}; [[October 24]], [[2006]]; [[Prima Games]]; US paperback<ref name="Amazon" />
